_readme: Just list your actual filenames below. Any name works — IMG_4521.jpg, myvideo.mp4, etc.
captions: I looked at you and forgot how to be okay alone ★
You smiled and something in me never recovered ♥
I took this so I'd have something when you're not around ✨
You were just sitting there. I was completely gone ★
This is the one where I realised I was already yours ★
I don't need more than this. Just you, just here ✨
Even your ordinary days feel like something sacred ★
I memorised this because I was terrified of forgetting ♥
You have no idea what you do to me. None at all 💛
You have no idea what you do to me. None at all 💛
